name: flashquery-graph-golden-model
description: Prompt-refinement workbench for FlashQuery graph intelligence. Runs YAML test cases through the REAL graph schema/vocabulary/validation logic against one or more OpenAI-compatible (Ollama) models, scores actual vs. expected, and writes a detailed report for debugging and prompt refinement. Not a CI gate; an iteration loop. Refined prompts/logic get pushed back to src/graph.
